name: Carry-Along Picnic Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, bring water to a boil; remove from heat.
2. Stir in potato buds until moistened and cool to room temperature.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. In a large mixing bowl, cream sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
5. Beat in potatoes with egg yolks.
6. Gradually beat in dry ingredients alternately with milk.
7. Stir in chocolate morsels.
8. Pour batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9 inches pan.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool in the pan.
11. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
12. Cut into 3-inch squares.
